core:messageResource.core:message: Application Updater
An exception occurred while executing the MSI upgrade script
An exception occurred while executing the Linux upgrade script
The us-pre-execute update hook script returned an error code
An exception occurred while applying the Application Update
The update process did not execute successfully
The update could not be found due to an error
The update did not execute because an update is already in progress
The update did not execute because of a problem initialising the Application Updater
Failed to initialise the MSI upgrade script
No MSI filename was defined in the MSI upgrade package
The MSI returned an error code after execution
The rmu-pre-stop-services update hook script returned an error code
The rmu-pre-delete-services update hook script returned an error code
The rmu-pre-kill-process update hook script returned an error code
The rmu-pre-install-bootstrap update hook script returned an error code
The rmu-pre-exec-msi update hook script returned an error code
Failed to initialise the custom upgrade
Failed to initialise the patch upgrade
Failed to initialise the Linux POS upgrade
No upgrade filename was defined in the Linux POS update package
No target directory was defined in the Linux POS update package
No install script was defined in the Linux POS update package
The Linux POS upgrade package's upgrade file contained unexpected content
Removal of existing directories failed during the Linux POS update
An exception occurred while executing the custom upgrade
